content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Markets are mixed-positive with Pharma (+2.37%), IT (+1.65%), Metal (+1.55%), and Energy (+1.28%) leading while Bank Nifty lags (-0.22%). VIX easing to 19.10 is constructive. Book is already 54% deployed with 3 open BUY orders pending — focus must be on managing existing positions and trailing SLs rather than adding new exposure. Several existing positions have moved favorably and warrant SL adjustments to lock in gains.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 77.50,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong fundamental thesis intact (Q4 PAT +34.89% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, brokerage TP Rs 88-90). Stock recovered from 78.51 low to 79.20 today (+1.67%). Tightening SL from 78.00 to 77.50 below today's intraday low and S2 (76.95) to give a touch more room while keeping risk contained. Target Rs 85 unchanged — aligned with HDFC Sec TP zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.03,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — current SL Rs 1025.03 is already above entry (Rs 984) locking in ~4% gain. Position up +6.4%. Stock pulled back intraday from 1060 high to 1043. Existing SL is already an effective breakeven-plus trail; no further tightening needed yet given intraday pivot R1 at 1001 hasn't been violated. Target Rs 1100 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down 0.4%, range-bound near entry. SL at 119 (~5% below entry) provides adequate room. No reason to act — gold is consolidating near record highs after a 60% YoY rally. Diversifier role intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD — current SL Rs 1418 already at breakeven-plus (entry Rs 1412.94). Stock at 52-week high zone Rs 1427 with strong Q4 (PAT +27%, double-digit volume). SL is well-placed; tightening further (e.g. to 1410) would loosen, not allowed. Keeping SL/target as-is. No-op MODIFY removed — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "SL Rs 694.48 is already above entry Rs 681 (locked +2% gain). CMP 694.40 is right at SL — if it triggers we exit at small profit. Q4 earnings in 2 days (Apr 29) creates binary event risk; tightening further is unnecessary as SL is essentially at breakeven-plus. Let it play out into earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.8%, SL Rs 2260 provides ~4.7% room which is appropriate ahead of Q4 results on Apr 30 (3 days). Binary event — don't tighten or exit pre-event. Position size small (~5% of capital). Hold through results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.8% with strong intraday momentum (CMP 414 vs entry 404.50), broke out above 52-week high zone. Trailing SL up from 404.50 to 406 (above entry) to lock in small gain. Stock making new highs on power-sector tailwinds and summer demand narrative. Target Rs 425 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Marginally negative -0.4%. Stock had volatile open (high 899, settling near 876). Research note flags BEARISH on SFIO probe + FY26 PAT -64.69% YoY — thesis weaker than initially assessed. SL at 850 (~3.2% from CMP) is appropriate; not tightening yet as stock needs room post-results. If it breaks 850 I'm out. Watching for exit signal next session."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT at 320.50 still pending. Do not duplicate. Letting existing order work. Note: NTPC already gives me Energy/Power exposure — if POWERGRID fills I'll have cluster concentration to manage."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT at 612.00 still pending. Do not duplicate."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT at 443.00 still pending. Do not duplicate. Also: combined with NTPC (held) and POWERGRID (pending), this would create power cluster concentration — if any of these fill, must reassess sector cap before adding more."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 77.50,
      "reasoning": "Tightening slightly below today's low and S2 to limit downside while preserving upside on strong Q4 print and brokerage upgrades."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.03,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry locking +4% gain. Strong Q4, GNPA 0.93% best-in-class. Let it run toward 1100 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Range-bound consolidation; SL at -5% acceptable for ETF diversifier."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven-plus. Stock at 52w-high — let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 694.48,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry; Q4 earnings Apr 29 binary event. Existing SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "Holding through Apr 30 Q4 results. SL gives appropriate room for binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing to lock breakeven+ as stock breaks out to new 52-week highs on power sector momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 850.00,
      "reasoning": "SFIO overhang flagged in research — not adding, watching for break of 850 to exit. Current SL adequate post-results volatility."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "M&MFIN (+7.95% on record Q4) and JSWSTEEL (near 52w-high on JFE JV) look interesting on pullbacks but chasing today's gap-ups is the wrong move with book already 54% deployed and 3 pending BUYs. ALKEM is BEARISH per research (below all MAs, 38% sell ratings) — avoid. ANANTRAJ is BEARISH (ED raid, PMLA probe) — avoid despite gap-up. UTIAMC posted Q4 LOSS — avoid. INDUSINDBK trade looks weaker than expected post-results; if it loses 850 next session, exit immediately and don't double down. SUNPHARMA chased post-Organon catalyst not in this batch — re-evaluate at Pulse next tick.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 54% deployed with 8 holdings + 3 pending orders. If POWERGRID/TATAPOWER/HINDZINC all fill, deployment goes to ~75-80% — at the limit. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + TATAPOWER) would be ~15-18% of capital combined, manageable but watch correlation risk. Win rate has been weak (5% over 5 days, 1W/2L) — this is why I'm prioritizing SL trails on winners (PNBHOUSING, NTPC) and tight discipline on losers (INDUSINDBK on watch). NO new entries this tick — existing pending orders provide enough exposure if they fill, and Q4 binary events on HINDUNILVR (Apr 30), GRANULES (Apr 29) need clean management runway."
}
